eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Montrose; Ouray; Gunnison, CO; at 5:18 PM on JUN 30, 2026 Effective until 9:18 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: WILDFIRE- Residents and campers in the area South of Storm King, east of Cimmaron Ridge to County Rd 864A in the Cimmaron Valley to the US Forest Boundary are on a VOLUNTARY EVAC status due to a fast moving wildfire.  Be prepared to evacuate. If you need more time evacuate now.  Refer to Zone 32 on the EVAC Map - view map at OurayCountyCO.gov WILDFIRE- Residents and campers in the area South of Storm King, east of Cimmaron Ridge to County Rd 864A in the Cimmaron Valley to the US Forest Boundary are on a VOLUNTARY EVAC status due to a fast moving wildfire.  Be prepared to evacuate. If you need more time evacuate now.  Refer to Zone 32 on the EVAC Map - view map at OurayCountyCO.gov
